base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mansion_tileset — a tile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Mansion atlas — gothic interiors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mansion atlas — gothic interiors; used in Brahm/Laruba/Berkley/Rover/Bodley mansions. Candelabras, ornate columns, red-carpet, spiked-walls, trap-rooms
